text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'm seeing more hot chocolate in the<n>vending
machines lately.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Wait a minute. The vending machines at<n>the
dorms all have only cold drinks.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Some people get stomachaches if they<n>drink too
many cold drinks, don't they?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Okay, this sounds like a job for the dorm<n>leader!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'll have a chat with Fuji and see if we<n>can get the
people in charge to add<n>some hot options!
